message:
feat(server): add MCP startup/transport compatibility lock (br-3vwi.13.9)

Lock externally observed MCP startup and transport behavior so existing
operator workflows and legacy client configurations are never silently
broken. Adds 40 tests (32 integration + 8 unit) covering:

- Default port 8765, host 127.0.0.1, path /mcp/ contract
- Path aliasing (/api/ ↔ /mcp/) interchangeability
- Health endpoint auth bypass (/health/*, /healthz)
- OAuth well-known endpoint payload
- Bearer token auth + localhost bypass defaults
- Initialize handshake on all path aliases
- Server name, capabilities, tool count stability
- RBAC role vocabulary and readonly tools contract
- Failure diagnostics (401/404/405/400 codes)
- Mail UI (/mail) coexistence with MCP endpoint

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
